l1.title: Verify your identity
l1.aadhaarHint: 12 digits. We send an OTP to your Aadhaar-linked mobile (may differ from your EaseCab number).
l1.note: We send a one-time password to your Aadhaar-linked mobile to confirm it's you.
l1.successBody: Now complete your profile to start posting.

fallback.title: No Aadhaar-linked mobile?
fallback.body: You can get verified manually — our team will review your details. (Available soon.)

driver.title: Driver credentials
driver.subtitle: Add your licence and vehicle to earn the verified-driver badge.
driver.dlSubtitle: Verify your DL number and date of birth.
driver.dlNote: Enter your licence details exactly as printed. We verify them against the RTO database.
driver.rcNote: Enter your vehicle's registration number. We fetch the RC details from the VAHAN database.
driver.uploadOptional: Add a photo of the document (optional)
driver.uploadRequired: Add a clear photo of the document (required)
driver.docBadType: Use a JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF
driver.badgePending: Submitted — the verified-driver badge is granted after admin review.

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.invalidOtp: Couldn't verify that code. Check it and try again.
errors.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify these details. Please check and retry.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

timeline.title: Complete your profile
timeline.postPending: Aadhaar + a profile photo unlock posting
timeline.photoHint: Add a profile photo to unlock posting.

detail.onlyYou: Only you can see this verified information.
detail.privacyNote: For your privacy, EaseCab stores only your verified status and the last 4 digits — never your full Aadhaar or demographic details.
detail.dlPrivacyNote: Your licence was verified against the RTO database. We store only your verification status — not the licence number or details.
detail.rcPrivacyNote: Your RC was verified against the VAHAN database. We store only your vehicle's make, model and registration — not owner, fuel or other RC details.

center.allDone: Everything's verified. Tap any item to edit or re-verify.
center.addPhotoNote: Add a profile photo to reach 100% and unlock posting.
center.rejectedNote: A document was rejected — tap it to fix and re-submit.
